notes: ITOTORI-234 v0.2 shape (was UTSUSHI-228 v0.1). Single (modelId, providerId) pair pinned for every stage of the agentic loop. The enUsSentinel substring is woven into the translation prompt so the patched Seen.txt's replay produces a TextLine whose bodyUtf8 contains the substring verbatim. ASCII-only by deliberate choice: the leading SJIS bracket required by the KAIFUU-191 lexer is wrapped around the sentinel by the patch step, not by the prompt. See UTSUSHI-227 for the sentinel-validation contract. The discriminator '228' lives ONLY in this policyId; the sentinel never embeds digits because lexer leads 0-4 collide with SELECTION_OPTION_MARKER under UTSUSHI-204. Per-stage zdr / fallbackModels / seed / maxPriceUsd are intentionally omitted: the parser fills in the canonical defaults (zdr=true everywhere, no fallback list, deterministic seed from leaf path, USD cap = DEFAULT_COST_CAP_USD/stage_count). Operator-level zdr downgrades require OPENROUTER_ZDR_DOWNGRADE; no file-level escape hatch.
